findings.detail: The revised design says the contract now has six control points (I1/I2/B1/R1/R2/R3), but 00-requirement.md's completion criteria still require AGENTS.template.md to split only three control points: “머지 승인” · “bypass 승인” · “릴리즈 승인”. Because 00/01/02 are all authority artifacts and 00 contains the acceptance criteria, this leaves the implementation target inconsistent: a phase could appear to satisfy 00 with one generic release approval instead of the required independent R1/R2/R3 approvals, or omit the new I1/I2 split. Update the 00 completion criterion to match the six exact control points and approval sentence/timing contract.

next_action: Revise 00-requirement.md completion criteria so it requires I1/I2/B1/R1/R2/R3 with the same exact approval-scope rules as 01-design/02-plan, then rerun design review.
